title: AUTORESEARCH_EVAL_RECEIPT_V1
description: Deterministic proof that an experiment improved a metric under fixed doctrine and environment. Non-sovereign. Authority=NONE. Becomes payload of a receipt in SKILL_PROMOTION_PACKET_V1.

experiment_id.description: Unique identifier for this experiment run.

metric_name.description: Identifier for the metric being measured (e.g. 'recall@10', 'latency_ms').

baseline_value.description: Metric value of the baseline (prior skill version or reference run).

candidate_value.description: Metric value of the candidate (new skill version being evaluated).

comparison_rule.description: Comparison predicate applied to (candidate_value, threshold). Frozen enum: gt=greater-than, gte=greater-than-or-equal, lt=less-than, lte=less-than-or-equal.

threshold.description: Numeric boundary the candidate must satisfy under comparison_rule for PASS.

result.description: Evaluation outcome. PASS=candidate satisfied comparison_rule vs threshold. FAIL=did not. INCONCLUSIVE=run was incomplete or environment compromised.

run_log_hash.description: SHA-256 of the raw run log artifact. Load-bearing provenance — ties receipt to concrete execution.

environment_manifest_hash.description: SHA-256 of the environment manifest (dependency versions, seeds, config) under which the experiment ran.

doctrine_hash.description: SHA-256 of the law_surface / doctrine artifact in force at evaluation time. Proves governance regime was fixed.
